title: Jayden's Bus is Here
about:
Jayden's Bus is Here or Jayden Your Bus Is Here refers to a series of video edit memes using a clip from the Mind of Rez (MindofRez) YouTube channel in which the YouTuber documents his younger brother, Jayden, getting onto the bus for the first day of the 2018 school year. The predominant punchline was about the "short bus" (a type of school bus typically used for transporting students with disabilities) that came to pick up Jayden and MindofRez's reaction to seeing it, which was saying an extended, "Woahhh." Jayden was 12 years old at the time of recording, heading into seventh grade.

The Jayden's Bus is Here clip went viral on TikTok in late 2025, initially due to several emotional, wholesome edits of the clip that added lens flares, among other ethereal camera effects, and the intro for the song "Free Mind" by Tems, which is notably used by streamer Fanum as his outro song. In the following weeks, predominantly in October 2025, increasingly absurd video edits of the clip surfaced, as well as Accuracy Reenactments in both real life and video games like Roblox and Fortnite.
origin:
On August 27th, 2018, YouTuber[1] MindofRez shared a vlog documenting the first day of school for his younger brothers Jayden and Kaylen, gaining over 10 million views and 182,000 likes in seven years. At the video's 3:28-minute mark, Jayden's bus arrives and MindofRez says, "Jayden's bus is here, woah."

Years later, on October 3rd, 2025, TikToker[2] @urgonnacomeback shared an edit of the Jayden's Bus is Here clip, which added stylized shake transitions and the intro of the song "Free Mind" by Tems.[3] Over three weeks, the video received roughly 328,500 likes.
